title: A Resolution authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) through the Local Chief Executive, Honorable Mayor Neil Andrew N. Nocon to enter into a Memorandum of Agreement (MOA) with Healthserv Los Baños Hospital and Medical Center located at Barangay Batong Malake, Los Baños, Laguna for the acceptance of patients referred by the Municipal Government of Los Baños, subject to the availability of facilities and other diagnostic procedures specified in the agreement.
